ddls:
CREATE TABLE "valuation_dates" (
  "valuation_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valuation date */,
  "valuation_date" TEXT /* The specific date when the valuation is performed */,
  "valuation_date_type" TEXT /* Type of valuation date (e.g., holiday, weekend) */,
  "valuation_date_status" TEXT /* Status of the valuation date (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("valuation_date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "curves" (
  "curve_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each curve */,
  "curve_name" TEXT /* Name of the interest rate curve (e.g., USD-Disc) */,
  "curve_type" TEXT /* Type of curve (e.g., interest rate, yield, discount) */,
  "curve_status" TEXT /* Status of the curve (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curve_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "curve_values" (
  "curve_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each curve value entry */,
  "valuation_date_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the valuation date */,
  "curve_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the curve */,
  "value" REAL /* The value of the curve at the given date */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label indicating the period (e.g., 1D, 1M, 1Y) */,
  "curve_value_status" TEXT /* Status of the curve value (e.g., pending, verified, rejected) */,
  "curve_value_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the curve value */,
  "valuation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the valuation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curve_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_curve_values_valuation_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("valuation_date_id") REFERENCES valuation_dates ("valuation_date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_curve_values_curve_id FOREIGN KEY ("curve_id") REFERENCES curves ("curve_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_manager_id" INTEGER /* Manager's ID for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the change made */,
  "audit_log_level" TEXT /* Level of the audit log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "audit_log_category" TEXT /* Category of the audit log (e.g., security, data, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for compliance record */,
  "valuation_date_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the valuation date */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding compliance */,
  "compliance_requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compliance requirement */,
  "compliance_requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_valuation_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("valuation_date_id") REFERENCES valuation_dates ("valuation_date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valuation_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valuation method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the valuation method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the valuation method */,
  "method_category" TEXT /* Category of the valuation method (e.g., market-based, model-based) */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the valuation method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "valuation_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the valuation method used */,
  "instrument_category" TEXT /* Category of the financial instrument (e.g., bond, swap, option) */,
  "instrument_status" TEXT /* Status of the financial instrument (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_valuation_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("valuation_method_id") REFERENCES valuation_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "curve_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "curve_value_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the updated curve value */,
  "update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the update occurred */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the update */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_curve_updates_curve_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("curve_value_id") REFERENCES curve_values ("curve_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_curve_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
